scripts.db:push: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.db:push:prod: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.db:migrate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:prod: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate:deploy
scripts.db:seed: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:seed
scripts.db:generate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:generate
scripts.prisma:generate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:generate
scripts.prisma:push: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.prisma:migrate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.prisma:seed: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:seed
scripts.prisma:studio: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:studio
scripts.build: bun run build:api && bun run build:worker
scripts.build:api: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun build apps/api/src/server.ts --outdir apps/api/dist --target bun
scripts.build:worker: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun build apps/worker/src/worker.ts --outdir apps/worker/dist --target bun
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:eslint && bun run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.precommit:verify: bun run lint-staged && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:root && bun run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.typecheck:workspaces: bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/worker typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/queue typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-config typecheck
